creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mohammad S. Babaei from comment #1)

I tried to reproduce this on a clean system, but the build just worked there (the fact that there is a binary package is also an indicator that the port is ok in general). 

So I suspect that this might be related to your system (e.g., existing installed other versions of php). Could you share your /etc/make.conf and the output of pkg info? Or could you simply try to build in a clean jail/a fresh vm or something to compare?
